themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "Rabanus Maurus on Commentary on Esther: That King Ahasuerus exacted tribute from all the isla...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".

themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "Mordecai's legacy: 'For Mordecai the Jew was next unto king Ahasuerus, and great among the Je...". Word-study detail reinforces "שָׁל֖וֹם: peace - safe, i.e., (figuratively) well, happy, friendly; also (abstractly) welfare...".
